signInRequired.title: Sign in to finish linking
signInRequired.description: Sign in with Google to attach this Telegram account to your web profile.

linked.title: All set!
linked.description: Your Telegram account is now linked to this web profile.

merged.title: Linked and merged
merged.description: We merged {vocab, plural, one {# vocabulary card} other {# vocabulary cards}} and {quiz, plural, one {# quiz answer} other {# quiz answers}} from your web account into your Telegram profile.

alreadyLinked.title: Already linked
alreadyLinked.description: This account is already linked to your Telegram. Nothing to do.

expired.title: Link expired
expired.description: Ask the bot for a new link with /link. Tokens expire after 15 minutes.

alreadyUsed.title: Link already used
alreadyUsed.description: This link has been redeemed. Generate a new one from the bot.

invalid.title: Link invalid
invalid.description: We couldn't verify this link. Try generating a new one from the bot.

missingToken.title: Missing token
missingToken.description: This page needs a link token. Run /link in the bot to get one.

notLinked.step1: Tap the button below to open the bot in Telegram.
notLinked.step3: We'll auto-link your Telegram account to this profile.
notLinked.localAuthNote: Telegram linking requires a Google account.
notLinked.localAuthHint: Sign in with Google to connect your Telegram account.

linked.title: Connected to Telegram
linked.description: Your Telegram and web accounts are linked. Progress syncs automatically.
linked.unlinkConfirmBody: Your Telegram-side data stays. Re-linking later will absorb any new web activity into the same identity.

groupInvite.title: Add the bot to your Telegram group
groupInvite.subtitle: Anyone in the group will get daily vocab and challenges.
groupInvite.step1: Open your group in Telegram and tap the group name to manage members.
groupInvite.step2: Add the bot below as a member.
groupInvite.step3: Send /start in the group to register it with IELTS Coach.

group.title: Want daily prompts in a group?
group.subtitle: Join the IELTS Telegram community for daily challenges and peer answers.
